summary: Complete testing of Employee Rest Days feature. The old 'Rest Patterns' (أنماط الراحة) system has been successfully replaced with direct 'Rest Days' multi-select on employees. Backend APIs verified: GET /api/employees returns rest_days array, PUT /api/employees/{id} accepts rest_days array. Frontend verified: Employee Management page shows rest days badges, edit/add dialogs have RestDaysPicker with 7 pill-shaped day buttons (سبت, أحد, إثنين, ثلاثاء, أربعاء, خميس, جمعة), toggle functionality works (amber=selected, gray=unselected). Department Settings for Gates confirmed 'أنماط الراحة' tab removed - now has 5 tabs: الأبواب, الموظفين, الخرائط, الورديات, المواقع.

backend_api.get_employees_rest_days: PASS - GET /api/employees returns rest_days array field for each employee
backend_api.update_employee_rest_days: PASS - PUT /api/employees/{id} accepts and persists rest_days array
backend_api.update_empty_rest_days: PASS - PUT /api/employees/{id} accepts empty rest_days array
backend_api.update_multiple_rest_days: PASS - PUT /api/employees/{id} handles multiple rest days correctly
backend_api.create_employee_with_rest_days: PASS - POST /api/employees accepts rest_days in new employee
backend_api.rest_days_valid_values: PASS - All rest_days contain valid Arabic day names

frontend_employee_management.page_loads: PASS - Employee Management page loads with data-testid='employee-management'
frontend_employee_management.table_headers: PASS - Table headers include 'أيام الراحة' (Rest Days) column
frontend_employee_management.employee_rows: PASS - Found 14 employee rows with data-testid pattern
frontend_employee_management.rest_days_cells: PASS - Found 14 rest days cells displaying day badges
frontend_employee_management.weekly_coverage_card: PASS - Weekly Coverage Card (التغطية الأسبوعية) exists
frontend_employee_management.edit_dialog_opens: PASS - Edit Employee dialog opens correctly
frontend_employee_management.rest_days_picker_in_edit: PASS - RestDaysPicker found in edit dialog with 7 day buttons
frontend_employee_management.day_button_toggle: PASS - Day button toggle works (amber=selected, gray=unselected)
frontend_employee_management.add_dialog_rest_picker: PASS - RestDaysPicker found in Add Employee dialog
frontend_employee_management.status_badges: PASS - Found 'في راحة' and 'نشط' status badges

department_settings.gates_tabs: PASS - Gates settings has 5 tabs: الأبواب, الموظفين, الخرائط, الورديات, المواقع
department_settings.rest_patterns_removed: PASS - 'أنماط الراحة' tab NOT found in Department Settings

critical_code_review_comments: RestDaysPicker component correctly implemented with pill-shaped toggle buttons
rest_days field properly added to EmployeeCreate and EmployeeUpdate models
Backend correctly handles rest_days as Optional[List[str]]
Frontend correctly computes 'on_rest' status based on today matching rest_days
WeeklyCoverageCard shows employee availability per day
Department Settings tabs correctly configured for gates (5 tabs) without rest_patterns
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 14 employees in planning department
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 tested the new Rest Days feature replacing the old Rest Patterns system. Key components: RestDaysPicker (data-testid='rest-days-picker'), day buttons (data-testid='rest-day-{day}'), rest days cells (data-testid='rest-days-cell-{id}'), weekly coverage card (data-testid='weekly-coverage-card'). Day values are Arabic: السبت, الأحد, الإثنين, الثلاثاء, الأربعاء, الخميس, الجمعة. Employee status shows 'في راحة' (amber badge) if today is in their rest_days array. Today is Tuesday (الثلاثاء). Planning department has 14 employees with rest data migrated from old weekly_rest field.
